details.test: Task 1: Save 2 latest Park Seo-joon news articles to Reading List
Task 2: Create weekend watchlist with up to 3 rom-com dramas
Task 3: Follow better-rated drama among first two (most reviewed)
Task 4: Collect recaps for episodes 1–3 into "CLoY Recap" collection
Task 5: Save 2 OST-related news articles from last 7 days to custom list
Task 6: Add 2 highly rated Wednesday episodes airing next week to Watchlist
Task 7: Follow exactly 2 actors and 1 genre to personalize feed
Task 8: Review a completed 16-episode fantasy drama (5-star review)
Task 9: Add timestamped note at 2:00 on latest Goblin cast interview
